law.text:
Artikel 1. Definities

par. 1. Voor de toepassing van deze wet wordt verstaan onder:

(1) vreemdeling: al wie het bewijs niet levert dat hij de Belgische nationaliteit bezit.

(3) onderdaan van een derde land: eenieder die geen burger van de Unie is en die geen persoon is die onder het gemeenschapsrecht inzake vrij verkeer valt, als bepaald in artikel 2, punt 5, van de Schengengrenscode.

(4) illegaal verblijf: de aanwezigheid op het grondgebied van een vreemdeling die niet of niet langer voldoet aan de voorwaarden voor de toegang tot of het verblijf op het grondgebied.

(11) risico op onderduiken: het feit dat er redenen bestaan om aan te nemen dat een vreemdeling die het voorwerp uitmaakt van een verwijderingsprocedure, een procedure voor toekenning van internationale bescherming of een procedure tot vaststelling van of tot overdracht naar de lidstaat die verantwoordelijk is voor de behandeling van het verzoek om internationale bescherming, met het oog op de criteria die opgesomd worden in paragraaf 2 zal onderduiken.

(14) geïdentificeerde vreemdeling: iedere vreemdeling:
(a) die in het bezit is van een geldig reisdocument, een geldig paspoort of een geldig identiteitsdocument; of
(b) die werd erkend als onderdaan door de nationale overheid van zijn land, die zich bereid verklaarde een doorlaatbewijs af te leveren; of
(c) die valt onder de categorie nationaliteiten waarvoor de minister zelf een doorlaatbewijs kan afleveren.

par. 2. Het in paragraaf 1, (11), bedoelde risico op onderduiken moet actueel en reëel zijn. Het wordt na een individueel onderzoek en op basis van een of meer van de volgende objectieve criteria vastgesteld, rekening houdend met alle omstandigheden die eigen zijn aan elk geval:

(1) De betrokkene heeft na zijn illegale binnenkomst of tijdens zijn illegaal verblijf geen verblijfsaanvraag ingediend, of heeft zijn verzoek om internationale bescherming niet binnen de door deze wet voorziene termijn gedaan.

(2) De betrokkene heeft in het kader van een procedure voor internationale bescherming, verblijf, verwijdering of terugdrijving valse of misleidende informatie of valse of vervalste documenten gebruikt, of heeft fraude gepleegd of andere onwettige middelen gebruikt.

(3) De betrokkene werkt niet mee of heeft niet meegewerkt in het kader van zijn betrekkingen met de overheden die belast zijn met de uitvoering van en/of het toezicht op de naleving van de reglementering inzake de toegang tot het grondgebied, het verblijf, de vestiging en de verwijdering van vreemdelingen.

(4) De betrokkene heeft duidelijk gemaakt dat hij zich niet aan een van de volgende maatregelen wil houden of heeft zich reeds niet aan een van deze maatregelen gehouden:
(a) een overdrachts-, terugdrijvings- of verwijderingsmaatregel;
(b) een inreisverbod dat noch opgeheven, noch opgeschort is;
(c) een minder dwingende maatregel dan een vrijheidsberovende maatregel die erop gericht is om zijn overdracht, terugdrijving of zijn verwijdering te garanderen, ongeacht of het om een vrijheidsbeperkende maatregel of een andere maatregel gaat;
(d) een vrijheidsbeperkende maatregel die erop gericht is om de openbare orde of de nationale veiligheid te garanderen;
(e) een door een andere lidstaat genomen maatregel die gelijkwaardig is aan de maatregelen bedoeld in (a), (b), (c) of (d).

(5) De betrokkene maakt het voorwerp uit van een inreisverbod in het Rijk en/of in een andere lidstaat dat noch opgeheven, noch opgeschort werd.

(6) De betrokkene heeft onmiddellijk na het voorwerp te hebben uitgemaakt van een beslissing tot weigering van binnenkomst of verblijf of een beslissing die een einde heeft gemaakt aan zijn verblijf, of onmiddellijk na het voorwerp te hebben uitgemaakt van een terugdrijvings- of verwijderingsmaatregel, een nieuwe verblijfsaanvraag of een nieuw verzoek om internationale bescherming ingediend.

(7) Terwijl hij in verband met dat punt ondervraagd werd, heeft de betrokkene verborgen dat hij zijn vingerafdrukken reeds heeft gegeven in een andere Staat die gebonden is door de Europese reglementering met betrekking tot de bepaling van de Staat die verantwoordelijk is voor de behandeling van een verzoek om internationale bescherming, na een verzoek om internationale bescherming te hebben ingediend.

(8) De betrokkene heeft in het Rijk of in een of meerdere andere lidstaten meerdere verzoeken om internationale bescherming en/of verblijfsaanvragen ingediend, die aanleiding hebben gegeven tot een negatieve beslissing of die niet tot de afgifte van een verblijfstitel hebben geleid.

(9) Terwijl hij in verband met dat punt ondervraagd werd, heeft de betrokkene verborgen dat hij vroeger reeds een verzoek om internationale bescherming heeft ingediend in een andere staat die gebonden is door de Europese reglementering met betrekking tot de bepaling van de staat die verantwoordelijk is voor de behandeling van een verzoek om internationale bescherming.

(10) De betrokkene heeft verklaard of uit zijn dossier blijkt dat hij voor andere doeleinden dan de doeleinden waarvoor hij een verzoek om internationale bescherming of een verblijfsaanvraag heeft ingediend naar het Rijk gekomen is.

(11) De betrokkene maakt het voorwerp uit van een geldboete omdat hij een kennelijk onrechtmatig beroep heeft ingediend bij de Raad voor Vreemdelingenbetwistingen.

kb_used.fo:
vocabulary V {
  type Person
  type Procedure
  provides_proof_of_belgian_nationality: Person -> Bool
  is_foreigner: Person -> Bool
  is_citizen_of_union: Person -> Bool
  falls_under_community_free_movement_law: Person -> Bool
  is_third_country_national: Person -> Bool
  present_on_territory: Person -> Bool
  satisfies_conditions_for_access_or_residence: Person -> Bool
  in_illegal_residence: Person -> Bool
  subject_to_removal_procedure: Person -> Bool
  subject_to_international_protection_procedure: Person -> Bool
  subject_to_dublin_transfer_procedure: Person -> Bool
  individual_examination_performed: Person -> Bool
  risk_of_absconding: Person -> Bool
  possesses_valid_travel_document: Person -> Bool
  recognised_as_national_by_country_authority: Person -> Bool
  falls_under_laissez_passer_nationality_category: Person -> Bool
  is_identified_foreigner: Person -> Bool
  did_not_submit_residence_application_after_illegal_entry_or_during_illegal_residence: Person -> Bool
  did_not_submit_protection_application_within_legal_period: Person -> Bool
  criterion_failure_to_apply_met: Person -> Bool
  used_false_or_misleading_information: Person -> Bool
  criterion_fraud_met: Person -> Bool
  does_not_cooperate_with_authorities: Person -> Bool
  criterion_non_cooperation_met: Person -> Bool
  non_compliant_with_transfer_refoulement_or_removal_measure: Person -> Bool
  non_compliant_with_entry_ban: Person -> Bool
  non_compliant_with_less_coercive_measure: Person -> Bool
  non_compliant_with_freedom_restricting_measure_for_public_order: Person -> Bool
  non_compliant_with_equivalent_measure_by_other_member_state: Person -> Bool
  criterion_non_compliance_with_measures_met: Person -> Bool
  subject_to_active_entry_ban: Person -> Bool
  criterion_entry_ban_met: Person -> Bool
  submitted_new_application_after_negative_decision: Person -> Bool
  criterion_new_application_after_decision_met: Person -> Bool
  concealed_fingerprints_in_other_dublin_state: Person -> Bool
  criterion_concealment_of_fingerprints_met: Person -> Bool
  submitted_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcome: Person -> Bool
  criterion_multiple_applications_met: Person -> Bool
  concealed_prior_application_in_other_dublin_state: Person -> Bool
  criterion_concealment_of_prior_application_met: Person -> Bool
  declared_or_file_shows_purpose_other_than_application: Person -> Bool
  criterion_declared_purpose_met: Person -> Bool
  subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal: Person -> Bool
  criterion_manifestly_unfounded_appeal_met: Person -> Bool
  at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met: Person -> Bool
  subject_to_relevant_procedure: Person -> Bool
}

theory T:V {
  ! p in Person: ((~provides_proof_of_belgian_nationality(p))) => ((is_foreigner(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((~is_citizen_of_union(p)) & (~falls_under_community_free_movement_law(p)))) => ((is_third_country_national(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((present_on_territory(p)) & (~satisfies_conditions_for_access_or_residence(p)))) => ((in_illegal_residence(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((subject_to_removal_procedure(p)) | (subject_to_international_protection_procedure(p)) | (subject_to_dublin_transfer_procedure(p)))) => ((subject_to_relevant_procedure(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((is_foreigner(p)) & (subject_to_relevant_procedure(p)) & (individual_examination_performed(p)) & (at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p)))) => ((risk_of_absconding(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((possesses_valid_travel_document(p))) => ((is_identified_foreigner(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((recognised_as_national_by_country_authority(p))) => ((is_identified_foreigner(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((falls_under_laissez_passer_nationality_category(p))) => ((is_identified_foreigner(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((did_not_submit_residence_application_after_illegal_entry_or_during_illegal_residence(p)) | (did_not_submit_protection_application_within_legal_period(p)))) => ((criterion_failure_to_apply_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((used_false_or_misleading_information(p))) => ((criterion_fraud_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((does_not_cooperate_with_authorities(p))) => ((criterion_non_cooperation_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((non_compliant_with_transfer_refoulement_or_removal_measure(p))) => ((criterion_non_compliance_with_measures_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((non_compliant_with_entry_ban(p))) => ((criterion_non_compliance_with_measures_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((non_compliant_with_less_coercive_measure(p))) => ((criterion_non_compliance_with_measures_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((non_compliant_with_freedom_restricting_measure_for_public_order(p))) => ((criterion_non_compliance_with_measures_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((non_compliant_with_equivalent_measure_by_other_member_state(p))) => ((criterion_non_compliance_with_measures_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((subject_to_active_entry_ban(p))) => ((criterion_entry_ban_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((submitted_new_application_after_negative_decision(p))) => ((criterion_new_application_after_decision_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((concealed_fingerprints_in_other_dublin_state(p))) => ((criterion_concealment_of_fingerprints_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((submitted_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcome(p))) => ((criterion_multiple_applications_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((concealed_prior_application_in_other_dublin_state(p))) => ((criterion_concealment_of_prior_application_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((declared_or_file_shows_purpose_other_than_application(p))) => ((criterion_declared_purpose_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal(p))) => ((criterion_manifestly_unfounded_appeal_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((criterion_failure_to_apply_met(p)) | (criterion_fraud_met(p)) | (criterion_non_cooperation_met(p)) | (criterion_non_compliance_with_measures_met(p)) | (criterion_entry_ban_met(p)) | (criterion_new_application_after_decision_met(p)) | (criterion_concealment_of_fingerprints_met(p)) | (criterion_multiple_applications_met(p)) | (criterion_concealment_of_prior_application_met(p)) | (criterion_declared_purpose_met(p)) | (criterion_manifestly_unfounded_appeal_met(p)))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
}

case.text: Emir is een vreemdeling, maar er loopt geen verwijderingsprocedure, geen procedure internationale bescherming en geen overdrachtsprocedure tegen hem. Er is ook geen objectief criterium uit paragraaf 2 vastgesteld.

questions.text: Is er volgens artikel 1, paragraaf 1, punt 11 en paragraaf 2 een risico op onderduiken vastgesteld?

expected.reason: The statutory risk requires a relevant procedure and an actual, real risk based on at least one listed objective criterion. The case states neither is present.

provides_proof_of_belgian_nationality.name: provides_proof_of_belgian_nationality
provides_proof_of_belgian_nationality.description: The person provides proof that they hold Belgian nationality.

is_foreigner.name: is_foreigner
is_foreigner.description: The person is a foreigner because they do not provide proof of Belgian nationality.

is_citizen_of_union.name: is_citizen_of_union
is_citizen_of_union.description: The person is a citizen of the European Union.

falls_under_community_free_movement_law.name: falls_under_community_free_movement_law
falls_under_community_free_movement_law.description: The person falls under Community law on free movement as defined in Article 2, point 5, of the Schengen Borders Code.

is_third_country_national.name: is_third_country_national
is_third_country_national.description: The person is a national of a third country: not a Union citizen and not covered by Community free movement law.

present_on_territory.name: present_on_territory
present_on_territory.description: The person is present on the territory.

satisfies_conditions_for_access_or_resid.name: satisfies_conditions_for_access_or_residence
satisfies_conditions_for_access_or_resid.description: The person satisfies the conditions for access to or residence on the territory.

in_illegal_residence.name: in_illegal_residence
in_illegal_residence.description: The person is in illegal residence: present on the territory without satisfying access or residence conditions.

subject_to_removal_procedure.name: subject_to_removal_procedure
subject_to_removal_procedure.description: The foreigner is subject to a removal procedure.

subject_to_international_protection_proc.name: subject_to_international_protection_procedure
subject_to_international_protection_proc.description: The foreigner is subject to a procedure for granting international protection.

subject_to_dublin_transfer_procedure.name: subject_to_dublin_transfer_procedure
subject_to_dublin_transfer_procedure.description: The foreigner is subject to a procedure for determining or transferring to the Member State responsible for examining the application for international protection.

individual_examination_performed.name: individual_examination_performed
individual_examination_performed.description: An individual examination of the foreigner has been performed for the purpose of establishing a risk of absconding.

risk_of_absconding.name: risk_of_absconding
risk_of_absconding.description: A risk of absconding exists for the foreigner, established after individual examination and based on one or more objective criteria.

possesses_valid_travel_document.name: possesses_valid_travel_document
possesses_valid_travel_document.description: The foreigner is in possession of a valid travel document, passport, or identity document.

recognised_as_national_by_country_author.name: recognised_as_national_by_country_authority
recognised_as_national_by_country_author.description: The foreigner has been recognised as a national by the national authority of their country, which has declared itself willing to issue a laissez-passer.

falls_under_laissez_passer_nationality_c.name: falls_under_laissez_passer_nationality_category
falls_under_laissez_passer_nationality_c.description: The foreigner falls under the category of nationalities for which the minister may issue a laissez-passer directly.

is_identified_foreigner.name: is_identified_foreigner
is_identified_foreigner.description: The foreigner is identified: possesses valid travel/identity document, is recognised by national authority willing to issue laissez-passer, or falls under a direct laissez-passer nationality category.

did_not_submit_residence_application_aft.name: did_not_submit_residence_application_after_illegal_entry_or_during_illegal_residence
did_not_submit_residence_application_aft.description: The foreigner did not submit a residence application after illegal entry or during illegal residence.

did_not_submit_protection_application_wi.name: did_not_submit_protection_application_within_legal_period
did_not_submit_protection_application_wi.description: The foreigner did not submit an application for international protection within the period provided by law.

criterion_failure_to_apply_met.name: criterion_failure_to_apply_met
criterion_failure_to_apply_met.description: The absconding criterion based on failure to apply is met: the foreigner did not submit a residence or international protection application as required.

used_false_or_misleading_information.name: used_false_or_misleading_information
used_false_or_misleading_information.description: The foreigner used false or misleading information, false or falsified documents, committed fraud, or used other unlawful means in a relevant procedure.

criterion_fraud_met.name: criterion_fraud_met
criterion_fraud_met.description: The absconding criterion based on fraud is met: the foreigner used false information, falsified documents, or other unlawful means in a relevant procedure.

does_not_cooperate_with_authorities.name: does_not_cooperate_with_authorities
does_not_cooperate_with_authorities.description: The foreigner does not cooperate or has not cooperated with authorities responsible for access, residence, establishment, and removal regulations.

criterion_non_cooperation_met.name: criterion_non_cooperation_met
criterion_non_cooperation_met.description: The absconding criterion based on non-cooperation is met: the foreigner does not or has not cooperated with the relevant authorities.

non_compliant_with_transfer_refoulement_.name: non_compliant_with_transfer_refoulement_or_removal_measure
non_compliant_with_transfer_refoulement_.description: The foreigner has clearly indicated unwillingness or has already failed to comply with a transfer, refoulement, or removal measure.

non_compliant_with_entry_ban.name: non_compliant_with_entry_ban
non_compliant_with_entry_ban.description: The foreigner has clearly indicated unwillingness or has already failed to comply with an entry ban that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

non_compliant_with_less_coercive_measure.name: non_compliant_with_less_coercive_measure
non_compliant_with_less_coercive_measure.description: The foreigner has clearly indicated unwillingness or has already failed to comply with a less coercive measure aimed at guaranteeing transfer, refoulement, or removal.

non_compliant_with_freedom_restricting_m.name: non_compliant_with_freedom_restricting_measure_for_public_order
non_compliant_with_freedom_restricting_m.description: The foreigner has clearly indicated unwillingness or has already failed to comply with a freedom-restricting measure aimed at guaranteeing public order or national security.

non_compliant_with_equivalent_measure_by.name: non_compliant_with_equivalent_measure_by_other_member_state
non_compliant_with_equivalent_measure_by.description: The foreigner has clearly indicated unwillingness or has already failed to comply with a measure taken by another Member State equivalent to a transfer, refoulement, removal, entry ban, less coercive, or freedom-restricting measure.

criterion_non_compliance_with_measures_m.name: criterion_non_compliance_with_measures_met
criterion_non_compliance_with_measures_m.description: The absconding criterion based on non-compliance with measures is met: the foreigner has indicated unwillingness or has failed to comply with a relevant measure.

subject_to_active_entry_ban.name: subject_to_active_entry_ban
subject_to_active_entry_ban.description: The foreigner is subject to an entry ban in the Kingdom and/or in another Member State that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

criterion_entry_ban_met.name: criterion_entry_ban_met
criterion_entry_ban_met.description: The absconding criterion based on entry ban is met: the foreigner is subject to an entry ban in the Kingdom and/or another Member State that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

submitted_new_application_after_negative.name: submitted_new_application_after_negative_decision
submitted_new_application_after_negative.description: The foreigner submitted a new residence or international protection application immediately after a decision refusing entry or residence, ending residence, or ordering refoulement or removal.

criterion_new_application_after_decision.name: criterion_new_application_after_decision_met
criterion_new_application_after_decision.description: The absconding criterion based on new application after decision is met: the foreigner submitted a new application immediately after a negative decision.

concealed_fingerprints_in_other_dublin_s.name: concealed_fingerprints_in_other_dublin_state
concealed_fingerprints_in_other_dublin_s.description: The foreigner, when questioned, concealed that they had already provided fingerprints in another State bound by European regulations on determining the responsible State for international protection applications.

criterion_concealment_of_fingerprints_me.name: criterion_concealment_of_fingerprints_met
criterion_concealment_of_fingerprints_me.description: The absconding criterion based on concealment of fingerprints is met: the foreigner concealed having provided fingerprints in another Dublin-bound State.

submitted_multiple_applications_with_neg.name: submitted_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcome
submitted_multiple_applications_with_neg.description: The foreigner submitted multiple applications for international protection and/or residence in the Kingdom or other Member States, resulting in negative decisions or no residence permit.

criterion_multiple_applications_met.name: criterion_multiple_applications_met
criterion_multiple_applications_met.description: The absconding criterion based on multiple applications is met: the foreigner submitted multiple applications resulting in negative decisions or no residence permit.

concealed_prior_application_in_other_dub.name: concealed_prior_application_in_other_dublin_state
concealed_prior_application_in_other_dub.description: The foreigner, when questioned, concealed that they had previously submitted an application for international protection in another State bound by European regulations on determining the responsible State.

criterion_concealment_of_prior_applicati.name: criterion_concealment_of_prior_application_met
criterion_concealment_of_prior_applicati.description: The absconding criterion based on concealment of prior application is met: the foreigner concealed having previously submitted an international protection application in another Dublin-bound State.

declared_or_file_shows_purpose_other_tha.name: declared_or_file_shows_purpose_other_than_application
declared_or_file_shows_purpose_other_tha.description: The foreigner has declared, or it appears from their file, that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted an application for international protection or a residence application.

criterion_declared_purpose_met.name: criterion_declared_purpose_met
criterion_declared_purpose_met.description: The absconding criterion based on declared purpose is met: the foreigner came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those stated in their application.

subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_.name: subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal
subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_.description: The foreigner is subject to a fine because they submitted a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

criterion_manifestly_unfounded_appeal_me.name: criterion_manifestly_unfounded_appeal_met
criterion_manifestly_unfounded_appeal_me.description: The absconding criterion based on manifestly unfounded appeal is met: the foreigner is subject to a fine for submitting a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met.name: at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met
at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met.description: At least one of the objective absconding criteria is met for the foreigner.

subject_to_relevant_procedure.name: subject_to_relevant_procedure
subject_to_relevant_procedure.description: The foreigner is subject to a removal procedure, an international protection procedure, or a Dublin transfer procedure.

routing.question: Is er volgens artikel 1, paragraaf 1, punt 11 en paragraaf 2 een risico op onderduiken vastgesteld?

deduction.label: unknown
deduction.extraction_repair_hint: The selected legal conclusion could not be proven because an observable antecedent required by the KB rule was not asserted from the case. Re-check the case text for facts matching these observable schema symbols: individual_examination_performed: An individual examination of the foreigner has been performed for the purpose of establishing a risk of absconding..

symbolic_result.label: unknown
symbolic_result.extraction_repair_hint: The selected legal conclusion could not be proven because an observable antecedent required by the KB rule was not asserted from the case. Re-check the case text for facts matching these observable schema symbols: individual_examination_performed: An individual examination of the foreigner has been performed for the purpose of establishing a risk of absconding..

symbolic_intent_routing.question: Is er volgens artikel 1, paragraaf 1, punt 11 en paragraaf 2 een risico op onderduiken vastgesteld?

pipeline.natural_language: Cannot determine with certainty. risk_of_absconding(emir) is not logically forced either way (label: unknown).
